name: Chartjs.Chartjs
comment:
A type-safe bridge to a Chartjs web component.

Note: this library isn't usable without including Chartjs as a Javascript dependency in your project,
along with the sister Javascript web component that goes with this library.
Please see instructions here: https://github.com/Blissfully/elm-chartjs-webcomponent

@docs Chart, ChartType, chart, defaultChart

aliases.name: Chart
aliases.comment: Required definition for a Chartjs chart
aliases.type: { chartType : Chartjs.Chartjs.ChartType, data : Chartjs.Data.Data, options : Chartjs.Options.Options }

values.name: chart
values.comment: Given dimensions and a chart, creates an HMTL node

values.name: defaultChart
values.comment: Given a type, creates a sane Chart config you can update
